title: ESA Reviewer LLM Response Schema
description: Structured-output schema for the ESA Reviewer stage LLM call. The LLM emits ONLY advisory_notes[] (max 3 strings). Verdict, checks, and claim_flags are set deterministically by the rule engine and are NOT LLM-overridable. Sprint C.E Phase 1 structural parity (AD-2026-04-24n). Adapted from AIM Reviewer LLM Response Schema. ESA-specific: R7 checks member_state_risk_matrix (all six elevated-risk states HU/GE/SK/RS/AT/CY) and actor_posture_scorecard (all four tracked actors RU/CN/US/IL). claim_id prefix pattern is esa-int-* not aim-int-*.

advisory_notes.description: Optional prose observations for the Composer's internal awareness. Each entry <= 500 characters. Emit [] if nothing useful to surface.
